title: rubus intermedius
intro: Rubus intermedius, also known as the intermediate raspberry or bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus intermedius include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent cancer, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Rubus intermedius can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
